data.title: UN gets Circle grant for border refugee aid; expects 20% cost savings in aid delivery with digital finance, stablecoins.
data.description: Circle has stated that leveraging digital financial infrastructure, such as stablecoins, has the potential to reduce delivery costs for humanitarian aid by 20%. This could lead to significant savings in the expenses associated with distributing aid to those in need.

data.title: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. shares preliminary Q4 and FY 2025 results. Includes unaudited revenue figures and operating margins.
data.description: ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTN and FSE: QH9) disclosed preliminary unaudited revenue, alongside GAAP and non-GAAP operating margin, for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2025, in Huntsville, Ala. The company's announcement was prompted by German ad hoc disclosure regulations in light of anticipated results exceeding previously projected revenue guidance. Key financial metrics were made public due to this anticipated outperformance.

data.title: Arrow Electronics (NYSE: ARW) named to Fortune's "World’s Most Admired Companies" list for 26th time, recognized in “Wholesalers: Electronics and Office Equipment” category for high performance. Based on input from thousands of executives, directors, and members of the financial community.
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado, Arrow Electronics, Inc. (NYSE: ARW) has secured its position on Fortune's prestigious World’s Most Admired Companies list for an impressive 26th time. The company excels in the "Wholesalers: Electronics and Office Equipment" category, standing out for its financial strength and the excellence of its products and services. This recognition is based on feedback from numerous executives, directors, and financial community members, highlighting Arrow’s consistent high performance and quality in its industry.

data.title: Ontario Airport reveals new monument sign at Archibald Ave & Airport Dr, symbolizing growth and momentum after a decade.
data.description: In Ontario, California, on January 21, 2026, the Ontario International Airport (ONT) revealed a new monument sign at the intersection of Archibald Avenue and Airport Drive. This sign symbolizes the airport's growth and ongoing progress as it commemorates ten years of operation. The sign serves as a bold representation of the airport's evolution and success in the aviation industry.
